text: **Who counts as a member** (`people.rs:14-24`): the union of (a) formal NIP-29 channel membership (`store.list_channel_members`), (b) anyone with a *live* status row for that channel (`live_status_for_channel`, i.e., someone can appear as a "member" purely by presence even without formal membership), and (c) self. Backends are filtered out: `people.rs:26` `.filter(|pk| !is_backend(store, pk))`, backed by the `relay_profiles.is_backend` flag.
